title: Multimodal Prompt Routing for Technical Document QA
journal: Proceedings of the Workshop on Scientific LLM Systems
abstract: This paper introduces a prompt-routing strategy that switches between OCR-aware and text-only question answering paths for technical manuals. The method improves response quality in documents that mix formulas, diagrams, and prose.
annotation_text: Interesting because routing is simple but practical. Need to compare with document triage pipelines.
